entry.value: Class: Rule Id/Name: Validation SubQuery Filter Action: run in Debug Object Browser by User spadmin

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE String PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <String>DATA FROM CODE : ad_business_role CN=abdul samadOU=PeopleOU=DemoDC=EshiamDC=com ADX BusinessRoleHTask CN=abdul samadOU=XPeopleOU=DemoDC=EshiamDC=com ADX BusinessRoleAccountingHtask CN=abdul samadOU=XPeopleOU=DemoDC=EshiamDC=com ADX roleExploration sr19 WebServicesApplicationEshiam </String>
